caption: A football game is played on a green field with white yard markers. Players in white uniforms and players in black uniforms engage in a play. In the first scene, a player in black is tackled by a player in white, while indicators label the players as "Murray" and "Peterson." A small inset window shows a man with blond hair watching the action. As the play progresses, the man in the inset remains visible while the view shifts to show a player in black on the ground. The scene then transitions to a wide shot of the stadium, where a "FedEx" logo is prominently displayed on a building. A scoreboard overlay shows the game status as "2nd & 4" with a clock at "1:18 33" and a shot clock at ":27." Finally, the view shows the man in the inset again alongside a wide shot of the field.
